name: NON-RESIDENT 2025 CONTRACT RATES AND AGREEMENT-Bountiful Safaris

origin.filename: NON-RESIDENT 2025 CONTRACT RATES AND AGREEMENT-Bountiful Safaris.pdf

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pristine Mara Bay Lodge, is a 5-star luxury lodge, located in the remote western reaches of the Maasai Mara National Reserve. Perfectly situated on the banks of a tributary of the Mara River while touching the earth lightly and floating across the landscape, this pristine section, allows you to experience an intimate and exclusive Maasai Mara safari.
texts.text: Pristine Mara Bay Lodge, is a 5-star luxury lodge, located in the remote western reaches of the Maasai Mara National Reserve. Perfectly situated on the banks of a tributary of the Mara River while touching the earth lightly and floating across the landscape, this pristine section, allows you to experience an intimate and exclusive Maasai Mara safari.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Comprising of 44 nostalgically elegant, and very spacious guest standard suites, that offer natural light, an enormous bed, bath, an indoor shower. Of these are 4 Family Suites that offer the addition of a smaller children's bedroom.
texts.text: Comprising of 44 nostalgically elegant, and very spacious guest standard suites, that offer natural light, an enormous bed, bath, an indoor shower. Of these are 4 Family Suites that offer the addition of a smaller children's bedroom.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Coming in 2026 is one presidential suite offering adventurous families the unique opportunity to explore the African bush together.
texts.text: Coming in 2026 is one presidential suite offering adventurous families the unique opportunity to explore the African bush together.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This is a contract between Bountiful Safaris and Pristine Mara Bay Lodge . The rates are to be applied effective from 6th January 2025 till 5th January 2026.
texts.text: This is a contract between Bountiful Safaris and Pristine Mara Bay Lodge . The rates are to be applied effective from 6th January 2025 till 5th January 2026.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: *All of the Suites are river rooms.
texts.text: *All of the Suites are river rooms.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: *To ensure your stay is comfortable and enjoyable, an extra bed may be required for triple occupancy in the suite. *To ensure your stay is comfortable and enjoyable, the quadruple occupancy of the suite is limited to 2 adults and 2 children under 12 years old, and an extra bed may be required.
texts.text: *To ensure your stay is comfortable and enjoyable, an extra bed may be required for triple occupancy in the suite. *To ensure your stay is comfortable and enjoyable, the quadruple occupancy of the suite is limited to 2 adults and 2 children under 12 years old, and an extra bed may be required.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All meals and accommodation,1 sundowner per stay, selected drinks, 1 guided nature walks within the lodge, child friendly activities (kids club), star gazing experiences, welcome by the Maasai, swimming, special song and dance from staff during birthdays and special anniversary celebrations.
texts.text: All meals and accommodation,1 sundowner per stay, selected drinks, 1 guided nature walks within the lodge, child friendly activities (kids club), star gazing experiences, welcome by the Maasai, swimming, special song and dance from staff during birthdays and special anniversary celebrations.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All meals and accommodation, shared game drives, airstrip transfer, 1 sundowner per stay, selected drinks, 1 guided nature walk within the lodge, child friendly activities (kids club), star gazing experiences, welcome by the Maasai dancers, swimming, special song and dance from staff during birthdays and special anniversary celebrations.
texts.text: All meals and accommodation, shared game drives, airstrip transfer, 1 sundowner per stay, selected drinks, 1 guided nature walk within the lodge, child friendly activities (kids club), star gazing experiences, welcome by the Maasai dancers, swimming, special song and dance from staff during birthdays and special anniversary celebrations.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Pristine Mara Bay Lodge additional room supplement:
texts.text: Pristine Mara Bay Lodge additional room supplement:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: US$100 per room will apply on Easter Holiday and during the Christmas season from December 24th, 25th, 26th, 31st & January 1st 2026 plus a 2 nights' minimum stay over Easter and Christmas season.
texts.text: US$100 per room will apply on Easter Holiday and during the Christmas season from December 24th, 25th, 26th, 31st & January 1st 2026 plus a 2 nights' minimum stay over Easter and Christmas season.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Family room supplement of US$ 200 per suite applies.
texts.text: Family room supplement of US$ 200 per suite applies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days during standard season and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.
texts.text: All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days during standard season and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Upon confirmation of a booking 30% deposit must be paid to secure the booking within 7 days. At least 60 days prior to arrival the remaining payment must be cleared. In the event that full payment is not received within the specified time, Pristine Mara Bay Lodge may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide service(s) to the clients.
texts.text: Upon confirmation of a booking 30% deposit must be paid to secure the booking within 7 days. At least 60 days prior to arrival the remaining payment must be cleared. In the event that full payment is not received within the specified time, Pristine Mara Bay Lodge may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide service(s) to the clients.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Block bookings confirmed and a deposit of 30% not paid within 14 days will automatically be released. The final payment should be cleared at least 60 days prior to clients' arrival at camp. Management reserves the right to accept block bookings.
texts.text: Block bookings confirmed and a deposit of 30% not paid within 14 days will automatically be released. The final payment should be cleared at least 60 days prior to clients' arrival at camp. Management reserves the right to accept block bookings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Group policy: For every 15 full paying clients, the 16th person sharing in a twin, stays on complimentary basis. Please note however, that the Maasai Mara National Reserve Park fees is payable per day, and the community levy fee is payable per night.
texts.text: Group policy: For every 15 full paying clients, the 16th person sharing in a twin, stays on complimentary basis. Please note however, that the Maasai Mara National Reserve Park fees is payable per day, and the community levy fee is payable per night.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Not more than four (4) single rooms can be held per block booking or group booking. Five (5) singles and above will be charged at double room rate.
texts.text: Not more than four (4) single rooms can be held per block booking or group booking. Five (5) singles and above will be charged at double room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Tour leaders or guides will be charged USD 200 and they will be accommodated in guide accommodation. However, subject to availability, guest standard suite may be provided at the discretion of Pristine Mara if such space is available.
texts.text: Tour leaders or guides will be charged USD 200 and they will be accommodated in guide accommodation. However, subject to availability, guest standard suite may be provided at the discretion of Pristine Mara if such space is available.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellation And No Show: will only be accepted when made in writing and acknowledged by our Reservations office.
texts.text: Cancellation And No Show: will only be accepted when made in writing and acknowledged by our Reservations office.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers (hereinafter
texts.text: Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers (hereinafter

texts.label: text
texts.orig: collectively called a CANCELLATION) are subject to Cancellation and No-show fees as follows: 45 days or more: Free cancellation 45 to 31 days: 50% cancellation charges 30 days or less : 100% cancellation charges.
texts.text: collectively called a CANCELLATION) are subject to Cancellation and No-show fees as follows: 45 days or more: Free cancellation 45 to 31 days: 50% cancellation charges 30 days or less : 100% cancellation charges.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 90+days: Free cancellation, 90 - 31days 50% cancellation charges, 30 days or less : 100% cancellation charges.
texts.text: 90+days: Free cancellation, 90 - 31days 50% cancellation charges, 30 days or less : 100% cancellation charges.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children: Children 12 years and above are considered adults. Children between 3 and 11 years will pay 75% if staying in their own room and 50% if sharing with an adult. Children under the age of 3 years sharing a room with an adult will be accommodated on
texts.text: Children: Children 12 years and above are considered adults. Children between 3 and 11 years will pay 75% if staying in their own room and 50% if sharing with an adult. Children under the age of 3 years sharing a room with an adult will be accommodated on

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All vouchers issued and bookings made by you shall be subject to the terms and conditions contained in this document (or amendments that we may communicate to you in writing) unless otherwise agreed in writing in advance by BOTH parties.
texts.text: All vouchers issued and bookings made by you shall be subject to the terms and conditions contained in this document (or amendments that we may communicate to you in writing) unless otherwise agreed in writing in advance by BOTH parties.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared through our accounts system before arrival of the clients.
texts.text: We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared through our accounts system before arrival of the clients.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are pleased to accept the following cards at the camp: Visa, Master and American Express.
texts.text: We are pleased to accept the following cards at the camp: Visa, Master and American Express.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Provisional Bookings: During the standard season, bookings will be held for 30 days prior to confirmation and 15 days during the peak season.
texts.text: Provisional Bookings: During the standard season, bookings will be held for 30 days prior to confirmation and 15 days during the peak season.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Location: Near Kiboko, Beside Mara River, Maasai Mara National Reserve, P.O. Box 72 Olololunga.
texts.text: Location: Near Kiboko, Beside Mara River, Maasai Mara National Reserve, P.O. Box 72 Olololunga.

table_cells.text: *Above quoted rates are in USD, per night, inclusive of 16% VAT, 10% Service Charge and 2% Training Levy. They do NOT include park fees and community levy that are mandatory. (Government Taxes might change without prior notice.)
Value Season 6 Jan - 31 Mar / 11 Oct - 20 Dec 2025
Peak Season 15 Jun - 10 Oct / 21 Dec - 5 Jan 2026
